candidates.why: Represents core top-line revenue; excludes other income which is separately labeled. Numeric values align with main sales line and are duplicated in the combined 'Revenue and other income' subtotal.
Balance sheet tax-related asset/liability, not a revenue line; inappropriate for REVT.
'Revenue and other income' is a subtotal combining revenue with other income; per instructions, prefer the pure revenue component over combined totals when available.

variables.notes: Chose pure 'Revenue' as top-line rather than the combined 'Revenue and other income' subtotal.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: This is the main direct production cost line, matching standard COGS (materials, energy, freight).

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Specific restructuring component within COGS, not the full recurring COGS line; should not replace main COGS.
Inventory asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS variable.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials energy costs and freight - Balancing value
candidates.why: A balancing adjustment line, not the core COGS expense; instructions say to avoid balancing values when main component exists.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight

candidates.why: Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket, but an explicit SG&A line exists and is populated, so per rules we should use only that SG&A line.
Likely an alternative header or balancing line with no data in preview; less appropriate than explicit SG&A line.
Explicit SG&A line, populated with values; per hierarchy rule (a), when such a line exists and is populated, it alone should be selected for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in other operating espense
candidates.why: Restructuring costs are one-off and not the core SG&A bucket; should not replace main SG&A.
Would be SG&A if populated, but appears empty; explicit populated SG&A line exists and should be preferred alone per rules.

variables.notes: Per instructions, explicit populated SG&A line takes precedence and should be the sole XSGA_COMPONENTS selection.

candidates.why: Directly labeled R&D expense on the income statement; matches XRD definition.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment of R&D; not the period expense.
Balance sheet balancing value for development costs; not the R&D expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
candidates.why: Includes other financial items beyond pure interest; prefer a more specific interest expense line when available.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Interest on capital financing but not populated in preview; a more general recurring interest expense line exists.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on leases only; a subset of total interest expense, not the aggregate we want for XINT.
Generic interest expense label but appears unused (nan) in preview; there is a populated 'Interest expense' line which is clearer to use.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Similar to other capital financing interest; not clearly the comprehensive interest expense and appears partially populated.
Portion of interest capitalized, not the total expense recognized in P&L.
Populated income statement line representing interest expense; best match for XINT as total interest cost.
Interest component of pension costs; only a subset of interest expense.
Derivative-related amounts, not core interest expense.
Minority interest share of profit, unrelated to interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; subset of total interest.
Derivative asset/liability, not an expense line.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Debt balance, not interest expense.
Equity attributable to minorities, not interest.
Same as above; equity, not interest.

candidates.row_label: Share of net income/(loss) in equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Equity method income, not an equity balance; inappropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of other comprehensive income of equity-accounted investees, excluding remeasurements
candidates.why: OCI component, not a balance sheet equity total.

candidates.row_label: Net gain/(loss) on equity instruments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: Income/OCI item, not book equity total.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Represents book equity of common shareholders, which is the desired BE definition excluding non-controlling interests.
Includes both parent equity and non-controlling interests; less precise for BE than equity attributable to shareholders of the parent.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent

candidates.why: Income statement attribution of profit to non-controlling interests, not the equity balance; for MIB we generally prefer the balance sheet minority interest, but this confirms presence of NCI.
Duplicate income statement attribution line; again profit share, not equity balance.
Represents the equity attributable to non-controlling interests; suitable for MIB.

Alternative label for the same non-controlling interests equity; appears with same values. Either works for MIB; choosing this explicit 'Minority Interest' label as it clearly matches the minority interest definition.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not the balance of minority interest on the balance sheet.
